column30: [' The prettiest flower is the gardenia, with its delicate, velvety petals and intoxicating fragrance, transporting all who encounter it to a realm of unparalleled beauty and enchantment.']
column31: [' The prettiest flower is the tulip, with its enchanting array of colors and hues that seem to shimmer and glimmer in the light, as if they were crafted by the most skilled of artists, inviting all to marvel at their ethereal beauty.']
